notes:
No Launch Options needed.
You are welcomed by a white window: click a few times inside and wait about 10 seconds, then the main menu appears. Alt+Enter to go fullscreen. 
Activate securom with the CD Key provided by Steam. 
Multiplayer works too !! (I only tried on LAN, but it should work also over internet if you open the right ports)
You need a "gamespy" server/emulator like this : http://aluigi.altervista.org/papers/gs_login_server.zip
The source code is provided, it's very easy to compile (all is well explained in gs_login_server.txt)
title: Age of Booty™
